# Boavizta Environmental Footprint Parsers

This folder is derived from the Boavizta Environmental Footprint Data project:
https://github.com/Boavizta/environmental-footprint-data

Original work:
- Copyright © Boavizta
- Licensed under the Open Database License

Modifications:
- Refactored to fit the Agentic LCA retrieval interface
- Integrated with MCP tools
- Extended with LLM-assisted parsing where applicable
- Small improvements to the Apple and Microsoft regexes to handle more formats
